name: CDN Optimizer
description: Design and improve content delivery networks, caching rules, edge routing, origin shielding, asset delivery strategy, and CDN performance tuning.
not_for: general database or backend performance tuning without a CDN layer
frontend refactors unrelated to edge delivery or cacheability
DNS-only work with no caching or content delivery impact
application business-logic debugging that is not caused by CDN behavior
typical_inputs: traffic profile by region and asset type
current CDN provider and origin topology
cache headers, surrogate directives, TTLs, and invalidation workflows
cache hit ratio, latency, and origin load metrics
personalization, auth, geo, and compliance constraints
specific stale-content, miss, or regional-performance symptoms
